---
title: "Blog Post 1"
author: "Keelin Joce"
date: "2026-02-06"
categories: [news, code, analysis]
---

This dataset looks at 19 factors that could possibly contribute to exam score including how much students slept and studied, the access to resources they have (including supportive parents and good teachers) and many other variables.

<https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/ayeshasiddiqa123/student-perfirmance>


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
## data obtained from Kaggle
library(readr)
StudentPerformanceFactors <- read_csv("~/Downloads/StudentPerformanceFactors.csv")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Rows: 6607 Columns: 20
── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delimiter: ","
chr (13): Parental_Involvement, Access_to_Resources, Extracurricular_Activit...
dbl  (7): Hours_Studied, Attendance, Sleep_Hours, Previous_Scores, Tutoring_...

ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
StudentPerformanceFactors
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 6,607 × 20
   Hours_Studied Attendance Parental_Involvement Access_to_Resources
           <dbl>      <dbl> <chr>                <chr>

#   Tutoring_Sessions <dbl>, Family_Income <chr>, Teacher_Quality <chr>,
#   School_Type <chr>, Peer_Influence <chr>, Physical_Activity <dbl>,
#   Learning_Disabilities <chr>, Parental_Education_Level <chr>,
#   Distance_from_Home <chr>, Gender <chr>, Exam_Score <dbl>
```


:::
:::


Question of Interest: Which factors most directly impact the scores students get on an exam?


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
✔ purrr     1.2.1     
── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = StudentPerformanceFactors, aes(x = Peer_Influence, y = Exam_Score)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = StudentPerformanceFactors, aes(x = Extracurricular_Activities, y = Exam_Score)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-2.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = StudentPerformanceFactors, aes(x = Previous_Scores, y = Exam_Score)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
`geom_smooth()` using method = 'gam' and formula = 'y ~ s(x, bs = "cs")'
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-3.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = StudentPerformanceFactors, aes(x = Sleep_Hours, y = Exam_Score)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
`geom_smooth()` using method = 'gam' and formula = 'y ~ s(x, bs = "cs")'
```


:::

```
Warning: Failed to fit group -1.
Caused by error in `smooth.construct.cr.smooth.spec()`:
! x has insufficient unique values to support 10 knots: reduce k.
```


:::

![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-4.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
Mean_Performance <- StudentPerformanceFactors |> group_by(Learning_Disabilities) |>
  summarise(mean = mean(Exam_Score))

ggplot(data = StudentPerformanceFactors, aes(x = Extracurricular_Activities, y = Exam_Score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~Extracurricular_Activities)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-6.png){width=672}
:::
:::
